title: Improved Visuals
description: A modpack improving visuals and performance
body:
Note: The modpack is client-side, you can use it on vanilla servers

This is a modpack that will improve your visual experience inside minecraft and increase the performance of the game.

## Including:

- ### [Blur](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-fabric)![Crafting menu ui with blurred background](https://i.ibb.co/hHfLwhB/image.png)
  This mod adds a blur effect to all the GUI's backgrounds

- ### [Better Command Block UI](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettercommandblockui)![An improved command block UI](https://i.ibb.co/2ySM7y7/image.png) This mod makes command block interface more human-friendly

- ### [Better Animations Collection](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-animations-collection) 
  This mod adds better animations to animals. Selected but not all animation images, for all of them go [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-animations-collection):
  ![Improved ghast tentacles animation](https://i.ibb.co/QpQjnKW/image.png)![Improved squid tentacles animation](https://i.ibb.co/kM65Fkp/image.png)![Dogs laying down on the grass](https://i.ibb.co/449j3Dq/image.png)![Dogs laying down on the grass 2](https://i.ibb.co/4tjg74C/image.png)![An Ocelot with a tilted tail](https://i.ibb.co/F54ZLck/image.png)![A cat.](https://i.ibb.co/LSQWVHn/image.png)![A sitting cat](https://i.ibb.co/K2MKhhy/image.png)![A twisted creeper](https://i.ibb.co/X4LcWXM/image.png)
- ### [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)![A message in the chat](https://i.ibb.co/FYgCTDV/image.png)
  This mod makes you see the head of a player that sent a message in the chat
- ### [First Person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model)
  This mod adds third person animations into first person
  ![Swimming in the boat](https://i.ibb.co/r5JMNhs/image.png)
  ![Aiming a crossbow](https://i.ibb.co/VSF10v1/image.png)
  ![Standing](https://i.ibb.co/VBLkBqS/image.png)
- ### [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) 
  This mod adds first person animations into third person
- ### [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves)
  This mod adds falling leaves into the game (no screenshots because the falling leaves are hard to catch, trust me)
- ### [Physics Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/physicsmod)
  This mod adds realistic block particles, mob ragdolls etc.
  ![Mining stone](https://i.ibb.co/6Z5q7zH/image.png)
  ![A ragdoll of a cow](https://i.ibb.co/mHPZLvV/image.png)
  ![Cutting down the tree](https://i.ibb.co/ZgrCyd5/image.png)


- Other mods (the more minor ones or optimization ones)
1. [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)
2. [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
3. [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
4. [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation)
5. [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
6. [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
7. [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
8. [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port)
9. [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) (shaders not included, bring your own)
10. [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu)
11. [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
12. [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
13. [Puzzles Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib)
14. [Smooth Swapping](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-swapping)
15. [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
16. [Starlight (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight)
17. [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)
18. [Telepistons](https://modrinth.com/mod/telepistons)
19. [Tiny Item Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/tiny-item-animations)
20. [Wavey Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wavey-capes)
